duration we're in a risk-on market
regime and when you're in a risk on
Market regime it pays you as an investor
to go further out on the risk Spectrum
so you do want to be in in in pockets of
the fixed income market like credit well
obviously one of the best performing
asset classes here on a risk adjusted
basis and so as long as we maintain this
